entities.name: spatula

attributes.materials: donkey, hare, goose, or chicken bone

entities.raw_quote: lingna ex spina alba vel lingna que vagantur in aquis... et faciat inde ignem

relationships.to: constraining a man, woman, spirit, or beast

summary: This chunk details several magical operations: an invisibility ritual using spirits and incense, a love ritual involving wax images and needles, a binding ritual using heated bone spatulas, and the summoning of a flying throne via elemental jars. It also includes methods for finding things in dreams and obtaining horses through specific names and bat blood.
key_passages: Tracto eciam de arte invisibilitatis, hodie quasi ab omnibus ignorata.
Tu Belial, tu Astarothtf tu Paymon, ad hoc sitis opus michi adiutores.
Per hoc experimentum constringitur homo, mulier, vir, spiritus, [vel] bestia, cuiuscumque condicionis existat.
voca regem nubium, nomine Bartha, vt mittat 3es de ducibus qui habent posse [super] nubibus
Ad inveniendum in sompnis que vis, scribe hec nomina in carta virginea
